name: Park Place Punch
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour raspberry-cranberry drink, orange juice and lime juice into a tall glass filled with ice.
2. Top with club soda.
Per serving: 116 calories (1 percent from protein, 98 percent from carbohydrate, 1 percent from fat), less than 1 gram of protein, 29 grams of carbohydrate, less than 1 gram of fat, 0 cholesterol, 19 milligrams of sodium, Exchanges: 1 fruit.
Makes 1 serving.
